parameters.name: list_bases
parameters.description: List all Airtable bases accessible with the configured PAT. Returns base IDs, names, and permission levels.

parameters.name: list_tables
parameters.description: List tables in an Airtable base with their fields, types, and views. Parameter: base_id (required, app... ID from list_bases).

parameters.name: list_records
parameters.description: List records from a table. Parameters: base_id (required), table (required, table name or ID), max_records (optional, default 10), view (optional view name), filter_by_formula (optional Airtable formula, e.g. {Status}='Done'), sort_field (optional field name to sort by), sort_desc ('true' for descending).

parameters.name: get_record
parameters.description: Get a single record by ID. Parameters: base_id (required), table (required), record_id (required, rec... ID).

parameters.name: create_record
parameters.description: Create a new record. Parameters: base_id (required), table (required), fields (required, JSON string with field values, e.g. '{"Name":"New task","Status":"To Do"}'). Linked records use arrays of record IDs.

value.fields: ={{ $fromAI('fields', 'JSON object with field names and values', 'string') }}

parameters.name: update_record
parameters.description: Update fields on an existing record (partial update — only specified fields change). Parameters: base_id (required), table (required), record_id (required), fields (required, JSON string with fields to update).

parameters.name: delete_record
parameters.description: Delete a record by ID. Parameters: base_id (required), table (required), record_id (required).
